잠언 5:1.content: My son, pay attention to my wisdom. Turn your ear to my understanding,

잠언 5:2.content: that you may maintain discretion, that your lips may preserve knowledge.

잠언 5:3.content: For the lips of an adulteress drip honey. Her mouth is smoother than oil,

잠언 5:4.content: but in the end she is as bitter as wormwood, and as sharp as a two-edged sword.

잠언 5:5.content: Her feet go down to death. Her steps lead straight to Sheol.

잠언 5:6.content: She gives no thought to the way of life. Her ways are crooked, and she doesn’t know it.

잠언 5:7.content: Now therefore, my sons, listen to me. Don’t depart from the words of my mouth.

잠언 5:8.content: Remove your way far from her. Don’t come near the door of her house,

잠언 5:9.content: lest you give your honor to others, and your years to the cruel one;

잠언 5:10.content: lest strangers feast on your wealth, and your labors enrich another man’s house.

잠언 5:11.content: You will groan at your latter end, when your flesh and your body are consumed,

잠언 5:12.content: and say, “How I have hated instruction, and my heart despised reproof;

잠언 5:13.content: neither have I obeyed the voice of my teachers, nor turned my ear to those who instructed me!

잠언 5:14.content: I have come to the brink of utter ruin, among the gathered assembly.”

잠언 5:15.content: Drink water out of your own cistern, running water out of your own well.

잠언 5:16.content: Should your springs overflow in the streets, streams of water in the public squares?

잠언 5:17.content: Let them be for yourself alone, not for strangers with you.

잠언 5:18.content: Let your spring be blessed. Rejoice in the wife of your youth.

잠언 5:19.content: A loving doe and a graceful deer— let her breasts satisfy you at all times. Be captivated always with her love.

잠언 5:20.content: For why should you, my son, be captivated with an adulteress? Why embrace the bosom of another?

잠언 5:21.content: For the ways of man are before Yahweh’s eyes. He examines all his paths.

잠언 5:22.content: The evil deeds of the wicked ensnare him. The cords of his sin hold him firmly.

잠언 5:23.content: He will die for lack of instruction. In the greatness of his folly, he will go astray.
